title: Sumo Logic User
description: A user account in the Sumo Logic platform.

roleIds.description: List of role IDs assigned to the user

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active

isLocked.description: Whether the user account is locked

lastLoginTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the user's last login

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last modified

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created this account

modifiedBy.description: ID of the user who last modified this account
